content: We can conceptualize a hierarchical self-improvement framework for autonomous LLM agents where Self-Refine acts as the low-level iterative polishing engine for individual outputs, while Reflexion acts as the high-level memory-directed strategic optimizer that guides what Self-Refine should target in each iteration. This layered structure leverages the core strengths of both approaches to unlock stronger unsupervised self-improvement than either can achieve alone.
